subcodes.title: Words to E.J. Rosenberg et al, spoken around Feb. 1901
subcodes.first_line: the Blessed Perfection had revealed secretly in a Tablet some words about Universal Peace... Two of the signs of the Manifestation of the Cause of God are the preaching and acceptance of the Religion of God
subcodes.subjects: @Christian rejection of Baha'u'llah and the Baha'i Faith, @suffering; rejection of Christ, @proclamation to kings; rulers; prominent individuals, @growth of the Cause, @universal peace; world unity, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people, @prophecy and fulfillment
